title: AttachmentPoints
description: Schema for .points.json files produced by aseprite_slices_to_points.py (v1.0)

source_image.description: Filename of the spritesheet image this data describes

sprite_size.description: Full pixel dimensions of the sprite canvas

origin.description: The rotation/anchor pivot point, derived from the 'Origin' Aseprite slice

raw.description: Pixel-center of the Origin slice in sprite canvas space

phaser_origin.description: Normalised 0-1 values for use with Phaser's sprite.setOrigin(x, y)

attachment_points.description: Named game-logic points expressed relative to Origin

name.description: Slice name from Aseprite (becomes the lookup key at runtime)

raw.description: Absolute pixel center of the slice in sprite canvas space

offset.description: Pixel offset from Origin. +x = right, +y = down (screen space convention)

distance.description: Euclidean distance from Origin in pixels

angle_deg.description: Angle from Origin to this point (atan2, degrees, screen-space: 0=right, 90=down)
